headline: Medtronic SPR Therapeutics Deal Expands Pain Portfolio As Shares Screen Undervalued
summary: Medtronic (NYSE:MDT) has announced plans to acquire SPR Therapeutics to expand its neuromodulation and chronic pain management portfolio. The deal adds SPR's FDA cleared SPRINT Peripheral Nerve Stimulation System, a minimally invasive, non opioid option for chronic pain patients. This move is intended to strengthen Medtronic's position in the U.S. pain management market and broaden its range of therapies. Medtronic is a large medical device company with an established presence in...

headline: Is It Time To Reconsider Medtronic (MDT) After Recent Share Price Weakness?
summary: With Medtronic stock trading at around US$78.60, this article walks through the key numbers so you can judge for yourself whether the current price offers fair value or a potential discount. Over shorter periods the stock has been mixed, up 3.2% over the last week, but down 5.6% over the last month and down 18.2% year to date. The 1 year return sits at 0.5% and the 3 year return at 6.4%, compared to a 27.7% decline over 5 years. Recent headlines around Medtronic have focused on its position...
